component.description: Scaffold a ki-* Stencil component with every gate wired: tokens-only CSS, mock-doc spec, real-browser + axe spec, public-entry export.

feature-spec.description: Scaffold specs/<NNN>-<slug>/feature.feature with the five constitutional scenario families (stable S-IDs, one When per scenario).

adapter.description: Scaffold @kimen/adapter-<name>: isolated protocol adapter (scope:adapter boundaries) with its COMPAT.md protocol matrix (Art. VIII).
